ocl:
context Payment
inv: (self.rental <> null) and (if self.amount > self.tax then self.amount else self.tax endif > 46)

context Reservation
inv: (self.customer <> null) and (self.vehicle <> null)

context Customer
inv: self.rentals->any(x | x.daysRented <= 1000) <> null

context Customer
inv: if self.balance > self.depositAmount then self.balance else self.depositAmount endif > 6

context Payment
inv: self.tax <> null and self.discount <> null

context Payment
inv: self.amount <> null implies self.tax <> null

context Payment
inv: self.discount <> null and self.tax <> null

context Reservation
inv: (((self.customer.isPremium) and (self.estimatedCost < 90)) and (self.dateTo < self.dateFrom)) and (not(((self.customer.isPremium) and (self.estimatedCost < 90)) and (self.dateTo < self.dateFrom)))

context Reservation
inv: (self.vehicle <> null) and (not(self.vehicle <> null))

context Payment
inv: (self.tax <> null implies self.discount <> null) and (not(self.tax <> null implies self.discount <> null))

context Customer
inv: (self.depositAmount <> self.balance) and (not(self.depositAmount <> self.balance))

context Customer
inv: (self.balance <= self.depositAmount) and (not(self.balance <= self.depositAmount))

context Payment
inv: ((self.rental.branch.vehicleCount > 5) and (self.tax < 11)) and (not((self.rental.branch.vehicleCount > 5) and (self.tax < 11)))

context Rental
inv: ((self.fuelCharge <> null) = (self.totalAmount <> null)) and (not((self.fuelCharge <> null) = (self.totalAmount <> null)))

context Rental
inv: (self.mileageEnd + self.mileageStart > 70) and (not(self.mileageEnd + self.mileageStart > 70))

context License
inv: ((self.customer.license.isValid = false) and (self.expiry.size() <= 20)) and (not((self.customer.license.isValid = false) and (self.expiry.size() <= 20)))

context Company
inv: (self.branches->exists(x | x.vehicleCount >= 0)) and (not(self.branches->exists(x | x.vehicleCount >= 0)))

context Rental
inv: (self.depositPaid <> self.lateFee) and (not(self.depositPaid <> self.lateFee))
